features: Effortlessly removes sand from legs and feet for a clean and smooth finish Our Sand Away Beach Powder quickly and effectively removes sand from your skin, ensuring a smooth and clean finish. It's specially designed to tackle the stubborn sand that sticks to your legs and feet.

Keeps skin feeling fresh and comfortable after a day at the beach This powder leaves your skin feeling fresh and comfortable, providing instant relief from the gritty sensation of sand. It’s the perfect solution for maintaining smooth skin after a day at the beach.

Essential travel and holiday accessory for beachgoers Ideal for travel, our sand-removing powder is a must-have for any beach holiday. It ensures you can enjoy the sun, sand, and sea without the inconvenience of sandy skin.

Convenient and easy-to-use powder, perfect for on-the-go use The easy-to-use formula makes it simple to apply the powder wherever you are. Its compact size makes it a convenient addition to your beach bag or travel kit.
description: Keep your beach days hassle-free with our 226g Sand Away Beach Powder. Specially formulated to remove sand from legs and feet effortlessly, this essential travel accessory ensures your skin stays smooth and sand-free. Perfect for beachgoers and holiday travelers, it leaves your skin feeling fresh and comfortable. Enjoy the beach without the mess, thanks to our convenient sand-removing powder.
